titleStmt.title: SII 27.158: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 158. (A.R. No. 511 of 1928-29.) GIḶIYARA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab planted in a field called Harataṭṭi-Bharat-kallu-guḍḍe.
This slightly damaged record is dated Śaka 1420, Kālayukta, Āshāḍha śu. 15, Tuesday lunar eclipse corresponding to 1498 A.D., July 3.

It registers a gift of land in the village Kōṭa to Narasappa, son of Bārakūra Haṁpaṇṇa, of Vasishṭha-gōtra, Aśvatayana-sutra and Ṛiksākḥā, by Sādhāraṇadē[va*]-oḍeya who was governing Bārakūru-rājya under the orders of mahāpradhāna Narasaṇṇa-nāyaka, for the merit of the latter. (cf. Further sources, Vol. I, p. 149, Appendix).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ . śrī gurubhyōṁ namaḥ . nirvighnamastu . namastuṁga śiraścu .
ṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī vijayādbhyudaya śālivāhana śaka varuṣa 1420 saṁ
du vartamāna kāḷayukta saṁvacharada Āṣāḍha śu 15 maṁgaḷavāradalū śrī .
maṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśvara mēdinī mīseyaragaṁḍa kaṭhārisāḷuva yiṁmaḍi narasiṁ
harāya mahārāyaru vijeya nagarada siṁhāsanadalu sthirarājyaṁgaiutti
rddalli śrīmaṁnmahāpradhānaṁ narasaṁṇanāyaka Oḍeyakara nirūpadiṁda sādāra
ṇada Oḍeyarū bārakūra rājyavanū pratipālisuva kāladalu svāmiśrī narasaṁ
ṇa nāyaka Oḍeyarige dharṁmmavāgabēkeṁdu sādhāraṇa dēva Oḍeyaru vasiṣṭagōtrada
Āślāyana sūtrada rukuśākheya bārakūra haṁpaṁṇagaḷa maṁkkaḷu narasaṁ
ṇagaḷige koṭṭabhūdāna dharṁmmaśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare śrī bārakūra sīme
ge saluva kōṭada grāmada Oḷagaṇabāravaṭṭiya Adhivāsada A ṇaheraḷanu
naṁma Aramanege teṟuva ta na hoṁnina Oḷage
hoṁna ga 24 Akṣaradalū yippattanālku kāṭiya hoṁnanu sādhāraṇadēva O
ḍeyaru vasiṣṭagōtrada Āśvalāyana sūtrada rukuśākhe bārakūra hampaṁṇagaḷa ma
kkaḷu narasaṁṇagaḷige tathātithiyalū sōmōparāga puṁṇyakāladalu sahiraṁṇyō .
saka dānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi dhāreyaneṟadu koṭṭivāgi Ā yippatanālku kāṭiya
ṁna teṟuva bhūmiya vivara Ā heraḷabāḷu 4 kaṁ
virada 3 vāya
ra heraḷa bāḷina vivara Aṁbaṭi ko dala saṁdinali Aṁntu 10 mūḍe ku
ḷāgra Ubhayaṁ yibbaru heraḷaka bāḷina 24 mūḍe mēle Aramane
ge teṟuva siddhāya kāṭiya hoṁnu niṁma saṁtāna pāraṁpareyāgi
Ā caṁdrārkkasthāyigaḷāgi sukhadiṁ bhōgisi bahavaṁtāgi sādhāraṇa dēva vo
ḍeyarū vasiṣṭagōtrada bārakūra haṁpaṁṇagaḷa makkaḷu narasaṁṇagaḷige
koṭṭa bhūdāna kuḷāgrakke
sarvvamānyavāgi koṭṭa dhanrmma śāsana . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānātsrēyō
nu pālanaṁ . dānāsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ yi
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.158 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
